PER STIPULATION. POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF PARTIES HAVE SETTLED AND THERE IS NO PROBLEM WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY
ON 11/4/98 AT 10:00AM. THE COURT WILL VACATE THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-04-1998, GRANTED
